caption: A man wearing a tall, silver, spiky wig, glasses, and a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie sits in a studio setting. He wears large black headphones and is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and posters. To his right, a white shelf holds various items, including a white box and a garment with the word "LEE" visible. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is overlaid on the left and right sides of the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, with slight movements of his head and mouth as he addresses someone off-screen. The camera remains static, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio environment without any significant change in lighting or composition.
